raw_title: Michael Atingi-Ego: Opening remarks – "Uganda Bankers Association (UBA) – Development Partners and Development Finance Institutions (DFIs) Dialogue"
raw_content: Opening remarks by Mr Michael Atingi-Ego, Governor of the Bank of Uganda, at the Uganda Bankers Association (UBA) – Development Partners and Development Finance Institutions (DFIs) Dialogue, Lweeza, 6 February 2026.
